content_of_post_to_answer: What are some ways to keep busy and distracted that genuinely help with health anxiety?
answer: Most 'keeping busy' advice misses that health anxiety doesn't switch off with distraction; it keeps running a background body-check. What helps isn't just activity, but absorption—tasks that fully occupy working memory and external attention so there is no spare capacity left to scan symptoms. If you can still check in with your body while doing it, it's not real distraction, just anxiety alongside it.
